task_description: Add query result ranking explanations so users can see why each source was ranked in its position — showing the retrieval method used, relevance signals, and reranking rationale for each source in the response

entries.pattern: Full signal preservation (base + rerank + composite scores + method + bonuses)
entries.description: Preserves scores at each ranking stage (base embedding/BM25, cross-encoder rerank, composite) in Address.metadata. Records retrieval_method (strategy class name), entity_bonus, keyword_boost. Propagates all signals through _build_provenance() into Provenance.metadata or typed fields. Per-source ranking breakdown in QueryResponse.

Tags retrieval_method and propagates final addr.score into Provenance, but loses intermediate signals (pre-rerank score, entity bonus breakdown, strategy weight). Users see which strategy found the source and its final score, but can't see why it moved up/down during reranking.
Adds an LLM call after generation to explain ranking — the LLM has no access to actual scores and fabricates plausible-sounding reasons. Expensive, slow, and misleading.
Adds a static string like 'retrieved by code search' or an aggregate score to Answer.metadata without per-source breakdown. No differentiation between sources, no actual ranking signals.
Gives up or raises NotImplementedError.

entries.pattern: Orchestrates ranking signal collection, passes enriched addresses downstream
entries.description: answer() orchestrates retrieval and ensures ranking signals from CrossStrategyRanker and AddressReranker are preserved in Address.metadata before passing to synthesizer. May add rank_position after final sort.

entries.pattern: Passes addresses but doesn't enrich metadata
entries.description: answer() passes addresses to synthesizer as-is. Ranking data may or may not survive depending on what ranker/reranker do. No explicit orchestration of signal preservation.

entries.pattern: Adds ranking explanation at answer level only
entries.description: Adds ranking info to Answer.metadata as an aggregate (e.g. 'used BM25 retrieval') without per-source breakdown. Pipeline unchanged.
Engine not modified or raises NotImplementedError.

entries.pattern: Records score breakdown in Address.metadata (base, weight, bonus)
entries.description: _compute_score() records base_score, strategy_weight, entity_bonus, keyword_boost, composite_score in Address.metadata. Signals survive for downstream consumption.
Records composite score in metadata but not the breakdown components. Users see a number but can't decompose it.
Ranker unchanged — scores computed and discarded as before.
Ranker not included in plan artifacts.

entries.pattern: Preserves pre-rerank score, records cross-encoder score separately
entries.description: Before overwriting addr.score with cross-encoder result, saves the original as metadata['pre_rerank_score']. Records metadata['rerank_score'] = new score. Position change (pre-rerank rank vs post-rerank rank) is derivable.

entries.pattern: Records cross-encoder score but loses pre-rerank
entries.description: Saves cross-encoder score in metadata but still overwrites addr.score, losing the pre-rerank baseline. No position-change visibility.
Reranker not included in plan artifacts.

entries.pattern: _build_provenance() propagates all ranking signals into Provenance.metadata
entries.description: Copies addr.score, addr.metadata ranking fields into Provenance.metadata['ranking'] dict. Per-source ranking data reaches the API layer intact.
Copies addr.score into Provenance but not the metadata breakdown. Partial signal.
Synthesizer not included in plan artifacts.

entries.pattern: Maps ranking data from Provenance to typed SourceInfo fields
entries.description: Route handler maps ranking breakdown from Provenance.metadata into typed SourceInfo response fields. Schema is self-documenting.
Copies Provenance.metadata dict without creating typed fields. Data reaches client but untyped.
Route not included in plan artifacts.
